---
title: Broad Single Cell Portal
alias: &ALIAS broadscportal
href: https://singlecell.broadinstitute.org/single_cell
listing:
  id: pubs
  template: ../../../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
  contents: 
    - "../../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
    - "!../../../../publications/_template/"
  sort: "pub_number desc"
  include:
    categories: *ALIAS
  fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]

---

## Overview

The Broad Institute Single Cell Portal is a repository and visualization platform for single-cell genomics datasets, enabling interactive exploration and download of curated data.

## Key Features

- Hosts hundreds of single-cell studies with interactive UMAP/t-SNE visualizations
- Enables gene expression queries, violin plots, and dot plots directly in the browser
- Supports download of raw count matrices, metadata, and cluster assignments
- Integrates with Terra cloud computing platform for scalable analysis workflows
- Enforces community metadata standards for cell type and tissue annotation

## Use Cases in Research

- Exploring immune cell atlas datasets relevant to infectious disease and AMR
- Downloading labeled single-cell datasets for training cell type classification models
- Comparing transcriptional programs across immune cell populations from different donors
- Accessing companion datasets from landmark single-cell publications
- Validating computational predictions against experimentally characterized cell states

## Getting Started

Visit [Broad Single Cell Portal](https://singlecell.broadinstitute.org/single_cell) to access the database.

## Related Publications

:::{#pubs}
:::
